fullText:

name: HackQuest
fullText:
3 days left to prove it on testnet 🔥

$23K in prizes on the line — but for top teams, it goes beyond rewards: direct entry to Bitstarter, 1:1 pitch opportunities with @opentensor leadership, and up to $270K in potential investment backing.

Compete and ship 👇 https://t.co/118huUaTLw

name: Box (mainnet arc)
fullText:
很多人没看懂harness是啥

其实程序员们换一个思路就能理解

你可以看成设计模式

什么单例模式，注册树，工厂模式，依赖注入，第一次看的时候很懵逼，这啥啊，我平时不也这么写吗。

其实就这么简单，等你研究完了，你就会发现，这啥啊，我平时就这么用ai啊

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Semi-truck transporting 12 tons of KitKat bars has been stolen during European grand theft auto heist.
